name: HMS Kintyre (T 165)
events: 18 Jul 1943 Around 1715 B/18, HMS Unruly (Lt. J.P. Fyfe, RN) grounded off Point de la Carriere, Bizerta Tunisia. Apparently she quickly got off and proceeded into Bizerta.
She was being escorted in by HMS Kintyre (T/Lt. C. Richardson, RNVR) which had joined around 1400 B/18. (1)
23 Nov 1943 HMS Unseen (Lt. M.L.C. Crawford, DSC and Bar, RN) arrived at Bizerta. She was escorted in by HMS Kintyre (T/Lt. C. Richardson, RNVR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
